title: ExpandedMC
description:
ExpandedMC is a modpack filled to the brim with mods that expand every aspect of minecraft! Bored of vanilla? Play this!

Now with Quests!
body:
![ExpandedMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84d5953b30e13be4748852dd283d7724ce5359d5.png)

## **MODPACK HAS BEEN DISCONTINUED AND WILL NOT BE UPDATED ANY FURTHER. IF YOU WISH TO PICK IT UP YOURSELF, FEEL FREE TO DO SO BY INSTALLING THE MODPACK AND GOING INTO ITS FOLDER.**

## **ExpandedMC is a modpack filled to the brim with mods that enhance every aspect of minecraft! Bored of vanilla? Then this modpack is for you!**

![Mods Included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef345fcd7628402fe57771a28cad54f26f24edb.png)

**Over 200 Mods 👀**

**Over 50 New Biomes 🗺️**

**Revamped & New Structures 🏢**

**Countless New Items ⚔️**

**Create Mod & Addons ⚙️**

**Powah! ⚡**

**Modern Industrialization 🏗️**

**Applied Energistics 2 💻**

**E4mc 💎**

**Optimization Mods ✅**

**Built-in Shaders 🌊**

And much more!
